meta.title: Learn Digital Marketing | TeamzEffort Program
meta.description: TeamzEffort is a digital marketing learning program that teaches SEO, social media, ads, branding, content, and website skills — with community support on WhatsApp.
meta.og_description: A practical digital marketing learning program for individuals — SEO, social media, ads, branding, design, and websites. Join our WhatsApp community.

hero.subtitle: An in-person program to master real digital marketing, grow your personal profile, and build true wealth—with hands-on offline training and a supportive WhatsApp community.
hero.video_label: TeamzEffort digital marketing learning program short

trust.practical_desc: Skills you can apply this week

about.heading: A learning platform built to grow you digitally
about.body: We are a team of designers, developers, marketers, and strategists who teach practical digital skills so individuals can build their personal brand, attract opportunities, and grow online with confidence.
about.quote: "Our team's smart work and unity are the real keys to our success."
about.card1_body: Learn from designers and storytellers who help you build a brand that stands out.
about.card2_body: Practice decisions backed by analytics — not guesswork.
about.card3_body: Short, focused modules so you learn and ship projects quickly.
about.card4_body: Honest feedback, shared goals, and community support.

curriculum.heading: What you will learn
curriculum.intro: Full-stack digital skills for individuals — from strategy and creative to execution online.
curriculum.m1_body: Build a growth mindset and multi-channel plans that attract the right audience.
curriculum.m1_outcome: Outcome: campaign basics you can run yourself
curriculum.m2_body: Content calendars, engagement habits, and platform growth for personal brands.
curriculum.m3_body: Ship fast, responsive pages with modern no-code tools that convert visitors.
curriculum.m3_outcome: Outcome: your own live landing page
curriculum.m4_body: Learn Meta and Google ads fundamentals with ROI-focused practice.
curriculum.m4_outcome: Outcome: confidence to launch test ads
curriculum.m5_body: Rank higher, get found, and grow organic traffic for your brand or projects.
curriculum.m6_body: Copy, blogs, and creative assets tailored to the audience you want to reach.
curriculum.m7_body: Position yourself clearly online — story, offer, and visual identity basics.
curriculum.m8_body: Create scroll-stopping creatives for posts, stories, and simple campaigns.
curriculum.m9_body: Shoot and select visuals that support your brand and content strategy.
curriculum.m9_outcome: Outcome: a simple visual content kit

process.heading: A simple path. Real skills.
process.intro: From first conversation to steady growth — clear steps, online-friendly, and collaborative.
process.s1_body: We learn your goals, audience, and challenges in a quick online session or WhatsApp chat.
process.s2_body: A tailored roadmap of modules, creative direction, and milestones that fit your pace.
process.s3_body: You complete guided lessons and projects while mentors support you in the community.
process.s4_body: Apply skills to your brand, track progress, and keep improving with peer feedback.

stories.heading: What learners say
stories.intro: Feedback from people building digital skills with TeamzEffort.
stories.t1_quote: "I started with almost no idea how digital marketing works. TeamzEffort broke it down step by step — from content planning to social media. Within a few weeks I was posting with a clear plan, not random content."
stories.t2_quote: "The SEO and website modules were the most useful for me. I learned how people actually search online and how to structure a simple page so it can get found. Mentors explained everything in simple language."
stories.t3_quote: "Paid ads always looked complicated until this program. After the ads module I understood targeting, budget basics, and how to test creatives. I launched my first small campaign with confidence."
stories.t4_quote: "What I liked most was the practical projects. I built a simple landing page, wrote my first set of captions, and got feedback from the community. It felt like real work, not only theory."
stories.t5_quote: "Personal branding and graphic design basics helped me show up online with more confidence. I finally know how to present myself, design simple creatives, and stay consistent with the WhatsApp community support."
stories.t6_quote: "As a busy learner, the flexible pace mattered a lot. Short modules, clear guidance, and the WhatsApp group kept me on track. I now understand content, branding, and how to grow my presence online without feeling lost."

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.intro: Quick answers about our learning model, time commitment, and how enrollment works.
faq.q1: Do I need prior marketing experience to join?
faq.a1: Not at all. Our curriculum is built from the ground up. We start with digital marketing fundamentals and gradually move into personal branding, content strategy, and paid acquisition.
faq.q2: How much time do I need to commit weekly?
faq.a2: We recommend about 3 to 5 hours per week. The program is self-paced and flexible for busy professionals, students, and side-hustlers.
faq.q3: Will I learn how to build my own website?
faq.a3: Yes. You will learn how to build high-converting landing pages and basic websites using intuitive, modern no-code tools.
faq.q4: Can I focus on just one channel, like social media?
faq.a4: Yes. Paths are modular. You can focus on social media, SEO, paid ads, branding, or content depending on your goals.
faq.q5: What is the investment, and are there payment plans?
faq.a5: We offer flexible monthly payment options and scholarship rates for eligible students. Join our WhatsApp community and message us to find a plan that works for you.

contact.heading: Ready to learn? Enroll now.
contact.body: Tell us about your goals. We will review your details and follow up via our WhatsApp community group and direct message.
contact.wa_body: Join our community group for updates, support, and enrollment follow-up. This is our main channel — no separate sales chat button on this page.

form.name: Name
form.err_phone: Please enter a valid phone number.
form.success: Thank you! We received your enrollment request. We will contact you via our WhatsApp community group and DM — usually within 24–48 hours. Please join the group if you have not already.
form.error: Something went wrong while submitting. Please try again or join our WhatsApp group to enroll.
form.consent: By submitting, you agree to be contacted about the program via WhatsApp and email. No spam — ever.
